indicators.name: folding cot against wall
indicators.rationale: A cot provides a minimal horizontal rest surface, though its size and location are far from ideal for sleep.

indicators.name: industrial lighting fixtures
indicators.rationale: Bright, industrial lighting fixtures are incompatible with sleep, as they cannot be dimmed and disrupt circadian signaling.

indicators.name: open office layout
indicators.rationale: The open office layout provides no privacy or acoustic enclosure for sleep.

reasoning_summary: This is a commercial office space with only a small folding cot as an afterthought. The bright, industrial lighting fixtures and open office layout are strongly incompatible with primary sleep. Only the presence of any horizontal rest surface at all prevents a score of 1.
